name: Chocolate Mayonnaise Cake W/Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, and baking soda.
2. Add water, mayonnaise, and vanilla; beat at medium speed until thoroughly combined.
3. Pour batter into a greased nine inch square pan or 11x7x2-inch pan (11" x 7" x 2").
4. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until cake tests done with a toothpick inserted in the center coming out clean and dry.
5. Cool completely on a wire rack before frosting.
Frosting:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Stir in brown sugar; cook, stirring occasionally, until bubbly.
3. Remove from heat and stir in milk. Cook for 1-2 minutes longer, stirring constantly.
4. Gradually add powdered sugar, whisking continuously until the frosting reaches a spreading consistency.
5. Immediately frost the cooled cake, as it will thicken quickly.
